Perfect! I now have all the information needed. Let me compile my findings:

## Summary

I've completed a thorough search for all CSS files related to collections in the `C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\` folder. Here are my findings:

### CSS File Location

**Single Primary CSS File:**
- **C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\collections\collection.css** (37,799 bytes)

This is the ONLY CSS file that contains all the class names you're looking for related to the collections feature.

### Class Names Found and Their Line Numbers

All the class names you specified are defined in this single file:

1. **user-collections-parent-container** - Line 1293-1302
2. **user-collections-container** - Line 1303-1309
3. **user-collections** - Line 1353-1370 (main card styling)
4. **back-button-container-user-collections** - Line 1329-1342
5. **journal-collection-image** - Line 854-864
6. **collections-title** - Line 829-840
7. **collections-text** - Line 841-853
8. **collection-name** - Line 1057-1065
9. **collection-description-container** - Line 1066-1074

### Full CSS Content

The complete collection.css file (1,524 lines) contains:
- Utility classes (text truncation, animations)
- Button system (.btn-collection variants)
- Character counter styling
- Privacy badge pills
- Selection checkmarks
- Skeleton loading cards
- Header styling (fixed position)
- Introduction banner
- Collection editor modal styles
- Older posts modal styles
- Journal entries styling
- Collection cards container and individual card styles
- Settings dropdown menus
- Card name, date, and description styling
- Delete confirmation overlay
- Collection journal cards (for profile page display)
- Empty state styling
- Not collected journals modal
- Collection profile display styling
- Responsive breakpoints (768px and 480px)

### CSS Import Location

The file is imported in:
- **C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\collections\Collection.jsx** (Line 2: `import './collection.css';`)

### Other Profile CSS Files

I also checked the profile-related CSS files but found NO collection-related classes in them:
- **C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\ProfilePage\myprofile.css** - Does not contain collection styles
- **C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\VisitProfile\visitProfile.css** - Does not contain collection styles

### Complete File Path for Reference

**C:\Users\johnm\iskrib_v3\client\src\components\collections\collection.css**

This single file is the authoritative source for all CSS styling related to ViewUserCollections.jsx and the entire collections feature.
